dashboardSection.title: Global Overview
dashboardSection.desc: Aggregate display of environment status, proxy health, and window sync overview.

profilesSection.title: Environment Workbench
profilesSection.desc: Manage profiles by group, execute batch launch, stop, and status inspection.

pluginsSection.title: Plugin Library
pluginsSection.desc: Download, update, uninstall plugins, and batch install to environments by filter criteria.

groupsSection.title: Group Management
groupsSection.desc: Manage business groups, notes, and archive policies. Groups can be linked during environment creation.

proxySection.title: Proxy Pool Monitor
proxySection.desc: Track proxy availability, region distribution, and recent failure records.

windowsSection.title: Window Sync Console
windowsSection.desc: Manage master-slave sync, window arrangement, batch tab actions, and text broadcast input.

browserControlSection.title: Browser Control
browserControlSection.desc: Window management, batch tab operations, and text broadcast input.

automationSection.title: Automation
automationSection.desc: Create and run RPA automation scripts. Control browser environments via CDP and Magic Controller.

aiChatSection.title: AI Chat
aiChatSection.desc: Chat with AI Agent using natural language to invoke browser tools and perform automation tasks.

settingsSection.title: System Settings
settingsSection.desc: Manage themes, resource version policies, and default runtime parameters.
